title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
